arts.ttl: Aston Villa send official on scouting mission for Thursday’s Europa League clash
arts.sum: Aston Villa sent a scout to the Estádio do Dragão for FC Porto’s clash against FC Midtjylland in the Europa League on Thursday. That’s according to Friday’s edition of A Bola, and they say an Aston Villa official was in attendance to closely follow the European tie. arts.ttl: Kick off Christmas in style at Villa Park
arts.sum: Fixtures Aston Villa Vs. Manchester City - Sat, Dec 21st 2024, 12:30 Pull on your claret and blue Santa jumper and eat another mince pie, Christmas is fast approaching and it’s time to get in the festive spirit! Now you just need the ultimate December day out… Well, look no further as Aston Villa host reigning Premier League champions Manchester City at Villa Park on Saturday, December 21 (ko 12.30pm) - and you can be there to bring the cheer in style with Villa hospitality. Whether you're looking for a relaxed matchday experience or something a little more luxurious, we have options to suit you and help get the Christmas party started. Aston Villa v Manchester City Hospitality at Villa Park Book Now Santa and his elves will also be on hand to help spread some joy and, for those feeling extra festive, we’d love to see your Christmas jumpers on show at Villa Park! Get knitted out in time for the big day... Christmas jumpers Shop Now

arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins injury update ahead of Aston Villa's trip to Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Unai Emery will take a late call on Ollie Watkins ahead of Aston Villa's Premier League clash against Nottingham Forest on Saturday. "After the training session, we are going to decide how the players are", Emery said when asked about team news.

arts.ttl: Villa to face Magpies in FA Youth Cup
arts.sum: Aston Villa will travel to Newcastle United in the fourth round of the FA Youth Cup. The Young Lions secured their place in the last 32 of the prestigious youth competition with last week’s emphatic 6-0 victory over Accrington Stanley. And, following Friday’s draw, Jimmy Shan’s side will now travel to the north-east to face the Magpies, with all fourth-round ties to be played by Saturday, January 18. Full fixture details, including a confirmed date and kick-off time, will be announced in due course.
